name: journey
description: Native user-journey chart — sections of tasks, each task tagged with actor(s) and a 1–5 mood. Renders as section bars + task chips + plumb lines + mood faces.
purpose: Use when a process or experience needs charting as a horizontal sequence of moments, each scored for affect. Five variants reshape the same source list: default (Mermaid-style classic), heatmap (mood-tinted chips), curve (mood polyline with axis), swimlane (per-actor rows), weighted (chip widths proportional to `+volume`).

heading.description: Slide heading naming the journey or process.

sections.description: Top-level li per section. Lead with the section name; nested ul carries tasks. Each task carries inline-code tokens: `@actor` (one or more), `:N` mood 1–5, optional `+N` volume (used by .weighted).

skeleton:
<!-- _class: journey -->

## Walking through my Tuesday morning.

- Wake up
  - Hit snooze `@me` `:2`
  - Make coffee `@me` `:4`
- Commute
  - Subway `@me` `:1`
  - Walk `@me` `:5`
- Work
  - Standup `@team` `:3`
  - Deep work `@me` `:5`
